# prompt-babbler Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-02-11

## Active Technologies
- Browser localStorage (babbles, templates, last prompt — V1); local config file `~/.prompt-babbler/settings.json` (LLM settings — backend) (001-babble-web-app)
- TypeScript 5.x (frontend), C# / .NET 10.0.100 (backend) + React 19, Vite, Shadcn/UI, TailwindCSS v4, React Hook Form + Zod (frontend); ASP.NET Core, Azure.AI.OpenAI v2.1+, .NET Aspire 13.1 (backend) (001-babble-web-app)
- Browser localStorage (babbles, templates, prompts); local config file `~/.prompt-babbler/settings.json` (LLM settings) (001-babble-web-app)

- .NET 10 / C# 13 (backend), TypeScript 5.9+ / React 19 (frontend) + ASP.NET Core, .NET Aspire 13.1, Azure.AI.OpenAI 2.1+, React 19, Shadcn/UI, TailwindCSS v4, Vite 7.x, Sonner (toasts), React Hook Form + Zod (forms), Lucide React (icons) (001-babble-web-app)

## Project Structure

backend/
frontend/
tests/

## Commands

## Code Style

.NET 10 / C# 13 (backend), TypeScript 5.9+ / React 19 (frontend): Follow standard conventions
